prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年安徽省理科（物理类）最低录取位次分别为约55名、82名、63名、58名、108名。2021–2024年基本在55–82名区间波动，2025年大幅后移至108名，较 2024年扩大约50名，为近五年最大降幅，2025年基准位次约108名；北京大学在安徽省理科（物理类）招生计划2021–2024年均为21人，2025年扩至25人，2026年 进一步扩至29人，较2025年增加4人（扩招16%），连续两年扩招，对位次有显著后移（数字增大）压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京大学为985、211、双一流建设高校，软 科中国大学排名连续6年稳居第2名，属全国顶尖学府，对理科高分考生吸引力极强；2026年高考周期内北京大学声誉评价为偏负面，涉及校园安全、录取争议等 舆情；但抖音综合热度排名第3（高热），短视频平台曝光量极大，整体报考关注度仍处高位。2025年湖北提前批出现招生空档属个别现象，不影响整体热度；北京大学理科优势学科群极为强大，数学A+、物理学A+、化学A+、生物学A+、计算机科学与技术A+、电子科学与技术A+、力学A+等，学科实力全面顶尖，对理科高分考生吸引力无 与伦比。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等理科热门专业社会热度高热推荐，人工智能相关方向关注度持续上升；安徽省2026年高考总报名人数约4 5.1万人，物理类考生按近年占比约69%估算约31.3万人，较2025年32.1万人略有减少；北 京大学位于北京，属跨省报考热门校；北京大学在全国各省招生分布均衡，安徽招生规模近年持续扩大。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移趋势、2026年继续扩招16%（ 从25人增至29人）、考生总数略降、学校声誉偏负面但抖音高热关注度不减、理科热门专业持续高热等因素，预计2026年理科（物理类）最低录取位次在2025年108名基础上继续 后移至约120名，区间90–150名。扩招是位次后移的主要驱动因素，但北大顶尖地位和理科热门专业的高热度对位次形成一定支撑，后移幅度有限。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for science (physics) in Anhui Province were approximately 55, 82, 63, 58, and 108 respectively. From 2021 to 2024, the rankings fluctuated within the 55–82 range, but in 2025 there was a significant drop to 108, an increase of about 50 places compared to 2024, marking the largest decline in five years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 108. The enrollment plan for Peking University in Anhui Province for science (physics) was 21 students each year from 2021 to 2024, expanded to 25 in 2025, and further expanded to 29 in 2026, an increase of 4 students (16% expansion) compared to 2025. Two consecutive years of expansion exert significant downward pressure on rankings (numerical increase).

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Peking University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranking 2nd in the Soft Science China University Rankings for six consecutive years, making it a top-tier institution in China with extremely strong appeal to high-scoring science students. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, Peking University's reputation evaluation is slightly negative, involving campus safety, admission controversies, and other public opinion issues. However, its comprehensive popularity on Douyin ranks 3rd (high heat), with massive exposure on short video platforms, so overall application attention remains high. The vacancy in the 2025 Hubei early batch is an isolated incident and does not affect overall popularity. Peking University's science advantage disciplines are extremely strong: Mathematics A+, Physics A+, Chemistry A+, Biology A+, Computer Science and Technology A+, Electronic Science and Technology A+, Mechanics A+, etc. The disciplinary strength is comprehensively top-tier, offering unparalleled appeal to high-scoring science students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering, and other popular science majors are highly recommended by society, and artificial intelligence-related directions continue to see rising attention. The total number of candidates registered for the 2026 Gaokao in Anhui Province is approximately 451,000, with physics candidates estimated at about 313,000 based on the recent proportion of about 69%, slightly down from 321,000 in 2025. Peking University is located in Beijing, making it a popular cross-province application choice. Peking University's enrollment distribution across provinces is balanced, and its enrollment scale in Anhui has been expanding in recent years.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant downward trend in rankings in 2025, the continued 16% enrollment expansion in 2026 (from 25 to 29 students), a slight decrease in total candidates, a slightly negative school reputation but high Douyin attention, and sustained high popularity of science majors, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for science (physics) in 2026 will continue to drop from the 2025 baseline of 108 to about 120, with a range of 90–150. Enrollment expansion is the main driver of the ranking decline, but Peking University's top status and the high popularity of science majors provide some support, limiting the extent of the decline.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Science Pilot Class (Yuanpei)
- Mathematics
- Computer Science (including Computer Science and Technology, Intelligence Science and Technology)
- Electronic Information
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Physics
- Engineering Pilot Class (including Theoretical and Applied Mechanics, Aerospace, etc.)
- Chemistry
- Biological Sciences
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier)
- Information Management and Information Systems
- Astronomy
- Geophysics
- Geology
- Environmental Science and Engineering
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 90–150, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, use Tier 1 majors for a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound (e.g., within 90), you can aim for top Tier 1 majors like Yuanpei, Mathematics, and Computer Science. If your ranking is near the upper bound (e.g., around 140), you should prioritize Tier 2 majors to ensure admission. Peking University's expansion slightly increases admission opportunities, but competition remains extremely fierce.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Anhui Province's Liberal Arts (History Category) were approximately 21st, 21st, 53rd, 33rd, and 27th respectively. In 2021–2022, it stabilized at 21st; in 2023, due to batch merging and other factors, it shifted to 53rd; in 2024, it rebounded to 33rd; in 2025, it further rebounded to 27th, showing a clear upward trend in the past two years, with a baseline ranking of about 27th in 2025. Peking University's enrollment plan for Liberal Arts (History Category) in Anhui Province was 16 students in 2021, 17 students from 2022 to 2025, and still 17 students in 2026. The plan has been stable for many consecutive years, with no expansion or reduction, having a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Peking University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class construction university. It has consistently ranked 2nd in the Soft Science China University Rankings from 2021 to 2026, making it a top national institution with extremely strong appeal to examinees. During the 2026 Gaokao cycle, Peking University's reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving campus safety (peeping incidents in women's restrooms, sexual harassment complaints), admission controversies (withdrawal incidents, dormitories not providing accommodation for professional master's students), and other public opinions. However, its comprehensive popularity ranking on Douyin is 3rd (high heat), with massive exposure on short video platforms, so overall application attention remains high. Regarding historical admission anomalies, in 2025 there was a vacancy in the Hubei early batch, which is an isolated incident. Peking University has a leading number of A+ disciplines nationwide, covering more than 30 A-class disciplines including Philosophy, Law, Chinese Language and Literature, Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Biology, Computer Science and Technology, Electronic Science and Technology, Clinical Medicine, etc. Its academic strength is comprehensively top-notch, with unparalleled appeal to high-scoring examinees.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular liberal arts majors such as Law, Economics, and Chinese Language and Literature continue to have high social heat. The total number of Gaokao registrants in Anhui Province in 2026 is approximately 451,000 (slightly down from 462,000 in 2025). History category examinees, estimated at about 30% of the total in recent years, are about 135,000, a slight decrease compared to 141,000 in 2025, so competitive pressure marginally decreases. Peking University is located in Beijing, a popular cross-province application school. Anhui Province is not a local province for enrollment, so there is no local preference. Peking University's enrollment distribution across provinces is balanced, and the enrollment scale in Anhui is stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the upward trend in historical rankings over the past two years, the continuous stability of the enrollment plan, a slight decrease in the total number of examinees, and the school's somewhat negative reputation but undiminished high attention on Douyin, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Liberal Arts (History Category) in 2026 will slightly shift back from the 2025 baseline of 27th to about 30th, with a range of 20–45. The slight backward shift is mainly due to the marginal easing of competition from the slight decrease in examinee numbers, but Peking University's top status limits the fluctuation range.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 20–45, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, use Tier 1 majors for a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 20), you can focus on impacting Tier 1 flagship majors such as Yuanpei, Law, and Economics; if your ranking is close to the upper limit (e.g., around 40), you should mainly choose Tier 2 majors to ensure admission.
